body.title: CLOSED: Librarian inference routing
body.description:
Wire inference routing into the Librarian. Same router pattern as Igor. Default to local low-cost models; escalate by task type.

Model tiers (config-driven, not hardcoded):
- Tier 0 (default): Qwen 8B — routine chat, channel replies, DB proxy responses
- Tier 1 (research/summarization): Qwen 32B or 72B (or largest available on rack)
- Tier 2 (complex reasoning): cloud escalation — Claude Haiku → Sonnet

Task-type → tier mapping is a simple config table (YAML or JSON), tunable by Akien without touching code. Any rack participant can chat with the Librarian via channel — the Librarian selects model tier automatically based on message type.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/inference.py, agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/model_config.yaml
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; inference router pattern consistent with Igor's
**Scope boundary:** routing + model selection only; research workflows in separate ticket
**Test plan:** task_type=chat → Qwen 8B selected; task_type=summarize → tier 1; config override works; escalation path reachable
